titleStmt.title: SII 20.178: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 178. (B.K. No. 30 of 1936-37.) HIPPARAGI, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab fixed into the wall in the temple of Kāśīliṅga.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1115, Paridhāvi, Bhādrapada, ba. Madhyāshṭaki, Monday, Kanyā-saṁkramaṇa. The Śaka year given was current. The details correspond to A.D. 1192, August 31, Monday, f.d.t., ·14. There was no Saṁkramaṇa on that day.

The inscription registers the grant of the village Iṁguṇige, at the request of Bammeya-nāyaka, for the worship and offerings to god Kalidēva at Hipparage by the king in conjunction with Phēyiya-sāhaṇi and Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Gōṇarasa of the Seḷaṛa (Silāhāra) family and others to Rājagurudēva of Bhujagāvaḷi-kula while sarvādhikāri Malleya-Sāhaṇi was governing Tarddavāḍi-nāḍu.
Also records other gifts to the same god by Māyidēva-daṇḍanāyaka, the officer in charge of taxes, and by Brahmadēva-daṇḍanāyaka headed by Dēvaparasa, the prabhu of Hipparige and Pārīsadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaravē traiḷōkyanaga
rāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . Aṁbudhipari
vritamappī jaṁbūdvīpakke mēru madhyavenikkuṁ jāṁbūnavarnna
vadu tāniṁbāgire lakṣayōjanōchritamakkuṁ . Aṁte
nisida mērugiriyiṁdaṁ teṁkaṇadeseyoḷeseva bhāratavarṣābhyaṁta
radoḷiḷākāṁteya kuṁtaḷamene celuvanāytu kuṁtaḷadēṣaṁ . kuṁta
ḷadēṣamanāḷvarananantāvanipāḷanikaramaṁ geldu mahīkāntāvallabha
rudubhaṭakāṁtaguṇāvāsaratibaḷarpphāṁḍusutaru . Aṁdiṁdi
ttalanēkarkkuṁdade sūryyēṁduvaṁśadoḷasamasukhamanāḷdaṁdu dhara
ṇiymanā vibhuviṁdaṁ tailapanināytu cāḷukyavesaru . Antavaranēkaraṁ
geludaṁtirekaḷacuriya bijjabhūpana bhujadiṁ santati rājyadoḷire ta
danaṁtara yadukuḷalalāma sēvuṇabīmaṁ . yadukuḷacakravartti sale
bhillamadēvana rājyalakṣmiyoḷu paduḷade tarddavāḍiyire phēyiya
sāhaṇi paṭṭasāhaṇakkadhipatiyāge maṁtriyene malleyasāhaṇi
dēvatāṁgabhōgada śivadharmmavūrjjitamenalu kuḍaliṁguṇavūranartthiyiṁ .
© munne purātabhaktaru varaṁ baḍedī sthaḷaveṁdu kīrttiyaṁ binnavisalke vai
ṣṇavaśivātmaka bammeyanāyakaṁ nijamanneya mukhyavāgi sale malleya
sāhaṇigaṁ samastarājyōṁnatameṁdu dharmmadabhivriddhiya buddhimanōnurāgamaṁ .
viracise kāḷidāsanene bāṇamayūrakavibrajaṁ savistaradoḷe mūṟu lō
kamaṟiyalu neṟe kaṇbaḍedaṁte rūḍhisuttire kaviḷāsabhūmiyenisirddudu
viśvajanakke kūḍe hipparageya kallināthane varabrajaliṁgakaḷādhimūrttiyo
ḷu . varaliṁgaḻparṣaliṁgaprabhe sakaḷakaḷāsānnidhisphūrtiliṁgōdbharitaṁ svā
yaṁbhuliṁgadratnakhacitamāṇikyaliṁgaṁ suvarnnōdhdharaṇīliṁgaṁ nadītīrado
ḷesedu jagatpāvanaṁ māḍutirkkuṁ suralōkaṁ tānidēṁ hipparageya kalidē
vēśanudyāva(na)raṁga . Ā puravaradudyānaṁ śrīpadadiṁ meṟeva divija
bhavanade jaṁbūdvīpakke śōbhevettaṁtiralā pottuṁ dēvabhōgamunisaṁkuḷadiṁ .
paramānaṁdamunīṁdraruṁdranenisalu dēvāṁśadiṁ peṁpiniṁ sthiracāritratapa
prabhāvadoḷu tāṁ sūryyaprabhāḷōkanōtkaradiṁdaṁ bhujagāvaḷīkuḷa
doḷaṁ śrīsāradādēviyoḷu varadaṁ rājagururmmunīśanesedaṁ lōkaika
vikhyātiyiṁ . Ā rājagurumunīśara cārucaritrabratake śaucada peṁ
paṁ dhāriṇi baṇnise sakaḷādhāramenippudu mahatvaguṇagaṁbhīraṁ .
© Antā bhujaṁgāvaḷīkuḷatiḷakarappa rājagurudēvara pādaprakṣāḷanaṁ
māḍi sakavarṣada 1115 neya paridhāvi saṁvatsarada bhādrapada bahuḷa
madhyāṣṭaki sōmavāra vyatīpāta kanyāsaṁkramaṇadaṁdu śrīmatu yā
davanārāyaṇaṁ pratāpacakravarti bhillamadēvaruṁ gajaturagapaṭṭasāha
ṇi phēyiyasāhaṇiyaruṁ seḷaṟakuḷakumaḷamārttaṁḍaṁ śrīmanumahā
maṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ gōṇarasaru mukhyavāgi śrīmatsarvvādhikāri malleyasāhaṇi
yaru tarddavāḍināḍaṁ pratipāḷisuttamire samastavastunāyakaśikhā
maṇi gaṁbhīra mēru gaṁḍabhairavaṁ ṭhapparada bammeyanāyakaṁ dēvakāryyamaṁ
besaṁgeyye śrīmanmahāsvayaṁbhu hipparageya kalidēvara Aṁgabhōga raṁ
gabhōga khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhāraṇakkeṁdu Iṁguṇigeya sarvvanamasyavāgi
tribhōgābhyantarasahitaṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru .
[©] svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyaka sē
nādhipati mudrahastaṁ suṁkada māyidēvadaṁḍanāyakaru śrīkalidēva
dēvara dēvakāryakeṁdu biṭṭa Āya dēvara tōṁṭavuḷḷanituṁ namaṣyagāṇa
veraḍu namaṣya baḍagi 1 kaṁmāṟa 1 saṁmagāṟa 1 Asaga 1 dēDamagga
ppinite gāvali 2 Intinataṟa baṇnigesuṁkamaṁ dēvara purakaṁ satva satpa
sarvvanamaṣyavāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru
śrīmatu hipparageya prabhu dēvaparasa pārisadēva mukhyavāgi
brahmadēvadaṁḍanāyakaru hālumaṁḍagege māṇikēśvarada kōlalu
sarvanamaṣyavāgi biṭṭa mattaru 12 kiṟiya divā prabhu
keḍeyoḷage biṭṭa haṁgada mattaru 2 vūroḷagaṇa gāṇa
kkaṁ soḷasa 1 ṟa lekkade biṭṭa paḷige 1 © śrīmatu
rasaṁ sōvarasaṁ cāmarasaṁgaḷu śāleya
biṭṭa mattaru 12 © śivadharṁmmajaṁ
Digital edition of SII 20.178 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
